title: Spicy, Herby Fish with Curried Orzo
summary: Warming curry-spiced orzo, juicy grilled cod, and heaps of herbs. Fresh, filling, and ready in a flash. This meal prep lunch means business.

method.description: Add the garam masala to a bowl with half the olive oil. Season with salt and pepper. Drop in the cod fillets and stir to coat evenly. Set aside.
Thinly slice the garlic, chilli and onion. Pick the basil leaves. Heat the grill to medium.
Heat the remaining oil in a large frying pan with high sides over a medium heat. Once hot, add the garlic, chilli and half the onion. Cook for 4–5 mins until softened.

Tip in the orzo and curry powder. Stir for a minute until fragrant, then pour in the stock and water. Bring to the boil, then lower the heat and simmer, stirring occasionally, until the orzo is al dente (check your pack for timings).

Place the cod onto a foil-lined tray and slide under the grill for 5–10 mins, until cooked through and lightly charred. If it’s colouring too quickly, move it down a shelf or turn the grill down slightly.
Stir the coconut milk through, until creamy. Season to taste with salt, pepper and a squeeze of lime juice. Add a splash of water into the orzo to loosen it, if needed.

Spoon the curried orzo into Tupperware containers and top with the grilled cod. Finish with a scattering of basil leaves, the remaining onion and chilli. Once cooled, box up and pop in the fridge, ready for tomorrow’s lunch — they’ll keep for up to 3 days.

chefs.name: Chloe René
chefs.summary: Chloe (@chlo_eat) takes inspiration from her diverse upbringing to create recipes and dishes influenced from cultures around the world. Despite her classical training, Chloe's philosophy in the kitchen revolves around simplicity and home-cooking. She firmly believes that the essence of a great meal lies in the quality of ingredients and the care put into their preparation. Instead of relying on complex and technical processes, Chloe prizes the art of letting ingredients shine through, enhancing their natural flavours with a delicate touch.
